title: Fault-Tolerant System Design
scenario: Design a fault-tolerant distributed system with 5 nodes that can recover from a node failure within 10 seconds. The system should prioritize high-priority tasks, handle node failures, and maintain data consistency. Use a high-level system architecture diagram and explain the role of each component. The output should be a markdown document with a system architecture diagram and a detailed description of the system's components and their responsibilities.
constraints: The system architecture diagram should use ASCII art.
The markdown document should contain at least 5 headings.

evaluationCriteria.description: The output meets all constraints specified in the prompt.
The system design is valid and can recover from node failures within 10 seconds.
The system documentation is clear, concise, and easy to understand.
